overall.description: A static first-person view from a high-rise cyberpunk apartment bedroom overlooking a foggy cityscape at dawn. A flying vehicle briefly passes the window as atmospheric fog gradually clears to reveal towering skyscrapers. Cinematic game engine footage with moody blue-grey lighting.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom with an unmade bed in the foreground. Through a large panoramic window, a dense fog completely obscures the cityscape outside, creating a moody, isolated atmosphere. The room features dark tiled walls and minimal furniture.

segments.scene_description: The static bedroom view is interrupted by a flying vehicle passing horizontally across the window. The car moves smoothly from left to right through the foggy airspace outside the high-rise apartment, briefly breaking the stillness of the dawn atmosphere before exiting the frame.

segments.scene_description: As dawn progresses, the dense fog outside gradually clears to reveal the city skyline. A massive skyscraper becomes visible on the right side of the frame as natural light increases. The bedroom interior remains unchanged while the exterior view transforms from opaque grey to a visible futuristic metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static first-person perspective from a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom as a dense, isolating fog gradually lifts to reveal a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins within the quiet interior of a room with dark tiled walls and an unmade bed, where a panoramic window looks out onto an opaque grey void. The stillness is briefly interrupted as a flying vehicle glides horizontally across the window from left to right, cutting through the thick dawn mist. As the light increases, the fog begins to dissipate, shifting the exterior view from a featureless haze to a clear skyline. The scene finally opens up to reveal a massive skyscraper on the right, transforming the moody atmosphere into a visible vista of the high-rise city.
